visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey newsboy cap sits in a brightly lit room. He wears a white t-shirt with a cartoon graphic and various bracelets on his wrists. He looks directly at the camera, gesturing with his right hand while a black smartphone lies on the table in front of him. The background is a plain white wall. (2) A social media comment box with Traditional Chinese text appears as a floating graphic overlay in front of the man's chest. He continues to gesture and speak toward the lens with a focused expression. (3) The man holds up four rectangular product boxes for screen protectors, fanning them out like a deck of cards. The boxes feature different branding, including 'MAGEASY' and 'imos'. He then places them down to focus on the phone on the table. (4) In a rapid sequence, the man picks up the black smartphone. He uses his fingers to peel off a transparent layer from the screen. He then takes a new screen protector, places it on the device, and forcefully slaps the phone face-down onto the patterned tablecloth several times. He repeats this process of peeling and reapplying with multiple protectors. (5) The man holds the phone up to the camera, showing a clean, undamaged screen. The scene then cuts to a full-screen graphic with a grey-to-black gradient background and several lines of Traditional Chinese text explaining the official Apple stance on the issue.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 大家好 Tim哥 網傳呢. (3) [Subtitle]: iPhone17系列 不能貼保貼 那件事情 我已經拍成一個影片了. (4) [Variety]: 保護貼試試撕了沒. (5) [Subtitle]: 但是還是太多人在下面留言 所以我決定今天在開賣日 我直接呢用我們這四家 這是我們家的保貼(金鋼盾) 這是MAGEASY 還有imos. (6) [Subtitle]: 我直接呢撕、貼給大家看 其實大家不用太擔心 但是我還是做給你們看 包含我現在呢 已經在我的iPhone17 Pro上 這一片就是imos的保護貼 我直接先撕開. (7) [Subtitle]: 我為了求快速啦 但是大家還是要用清潔組 我還是快速撕、貼藍光盾 你看要對準 但我沒有. (8) [Subtitle]: 好，撕開 藍光盾撕起來. (9) [Subtitle]: 這是我們家的金鋼盾一樣 直接貼上去 好，再撕開. (10) [Subtitle]: 最後一個 這個是MAGEASY的 拿起來. (11) [Subtitle]: 好，撕開 OK，完全沒事. (12) [Slogan]: 已經證實蘋果官方沒有發表「iPhone17 不能貼保護貼」的言論 我也跟品牌保護貼原廠討論過 目前市面上知名品牌保護貼的膠 都不是用黏性過強的膠 請大家不用擔心！

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the tech review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian man with glasses, wearing a grey newsboy cap and a white t-shirt with a green cartoon graphic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor studio or office with a plain white wall and a table covered with a white and grey patterned runner.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and a fast tempo in Mandarin Chinese. The vocal delivery is clear and professional, with a friendly tone. An upbeat, electronic background music track with a steady, driving beat plays at a moderate volume. The acoustic environment is very clean, resembling a studio setting with no ambient noise. (2) A sharp, high-frequency rustling sound occurs as plastic is peeled back. This is immediately followed by a dull, mid-frequency percussive thud as a solid object hits the table surface. The male voice continues to narrate with rising intonation, sounding excited and determined. The BGM remains constant in the background. (3) Another sequence of sharp rustling sounds and a series of rapid, rhythmic thuds occurs. The vocal pitch fluctuates as the speaker emphasizes certain physical actions. The music beat matches the pace of the physical sounds, creating a dense and active auditory landscape. (4) The speaker's tone shifts to a more conclusive and reassuring quality. The volume of his voice remains steady, but the speed of speech slows slightly to deliver a final message. The background music maintains its tempo but begins to fade out as the track ends. There are no further mechanical or impact sounds detected.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To debunk a rumor regarding the iPhone 17 series' inability to use screen protectors by physically demonstrating the successful application and removal of four major brands without damaging the device.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names and displays products from four specific brands (imos, MAGEASY, 藍光盾, 金鋼盾) as reliable options.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy 'stress test' style presentation to immediately engage viewers and provide empirical evidence against a tech rumor.
